# Stellar Pilgrimage: Navigating Life's Journey
## Scripture
"And God said, 'Let there be lights in the vault of the sky to separate the day from the night, and let them serve as signs to mark sacred times, and days and years.'" - Genesis 1:14

## Reflection
As we gaze upon the night sky, we're reminded of the celestial bodies that guide us through life's journey. Just as the stars and planets navigate the vast expanse of space, we too are on a pilgrimage, navigating the twists and turns of our faith walk. The phases of the moon, the passage of the seasons, and the movement of the stars all serve as signs, marking sacred times and reminding us of God's sovereignty over our lives.

## Prayer
Dear Heavenly Father, as we journey through life, help us to look to the stars and remember your promise to guide us. May the celestial bodies remind us of your faithfulness and provision. Just as the morning star shines bright, may Jesus, the light of the world, illuminate our path and direct our steps. Give us wisdom to navigate life's challenges and trust in your goodness, even when the darkness seems overwhelming. Thank you for the beauty of the night sky, a constant reminder of your love and presence in our lives. Amen.
